standardRefs: NYS ELA Reading Literature
New York State Next Generation English Language Arts Learning Standards
questions.prompt: In English 9, which concept is most central to the unit "English 9: Reading Literature"?
questions.correctText: theme
choices: character development

text structure
theme
questions.explanation: theme is a core idea in English 9: Reading Literature. The related standard asks students to connect the concept to evidence, process, or application rather than treat it as a loose vocabulary word.

standardRefs: NYS ELA Reading Literature

questions.prompt: A student reviewing English 9: Reading Literature needs to show the skill "infer theme." Which action best fits that skill?

memorizing an isolated fact without evidence
Use evidence to explain character development.
questions.explanation: The useful move is to connect evidence to character development; this matches the standards/CED emphasis on reasoning and application.
